title: Provincial film and media tax credits - Canada.ca
content:
## Provincial film and media tax credits
Through the film services units, the Canada Revenue Agency reviews and audits provincial film and media tax credits on behalf of the provinces of British Columbia, Manitoba and Ontario.
- British Columbia refundable media tax credits
- Manitoba film and video production tax credit
- Ontario refundable media tax credits
- Manitoba Film and Music

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
